problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Combining Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
